CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Pioneer — Accountable Care Organizations (ACO) — Provider File V2
Version — May 2025
SAS name Label Type Length
ACO_ID ACO Identifier CHAR 4
PRVDR_ACO_YEAR Year of Provider ACO Source Record NUM 4
ORG_TIN Billing TIN of ACO Participant CHAR 9
ORG_CCN CMS Certification Number CHAR 6
IND_NPI NPI for Practitioner CHAR 10
ORG_NAME Legal Business Name Associated with the ACO Participant TIN CHAR 70
LAST_NAME Last Name of Provider Associated with
